case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. BOSTON, MAURICE

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BOSTON, MAURICE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOSTON, MAURICE $7,902.71 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,902.71, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOSTON, MAURICE $3,878.32 PRINCIPAL, $98.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,976.32
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $3,906.39 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BOSTON, MAURICE NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT SERVED JUN-16-2009, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT BOSTON, MAURICE PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JUL-22-2009 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
